_description: Dual-axis worksheet: two measures on the same axis using the + operator in the cols/rows shelf. Generates 3 panes (one per measure plus the combined-axes pane).

shelf_expression._description: Dual-axis cols shelf: sum both measures using + operator
shelf_expression._note: The + operator on the shelf creates a dual axis. Both CI names must be distinct.

panes._description: A dual-axis view generates 3 panes: pane id=1 (first measure), pane id=2 (second measure), and the combined-axes pane (id=3 with name='__combined_axes')

combined_axes_pane._note: This pane is auto-generated by Tableau for dual-axis. Do not manually add it.

notes.vs_multi_measure: Single axis multi-measure uses ([ds].[ci1]*[ds].[ci2]) with * operator
notes.mark_class_per_pane: Each pane can have its own mark class — pane 1 and 2 are independently configurable
notes.synchronize_axes: To synchronize Y axes: add synchronize-axis node in the view
notes.combined_axes_pane: The __combined_axes pane is auto-created; don't manually add it — Tableau will create it
